title: Genesis
details: Genesis answers two big questions: How did Gods relationship with the world begin? and Where did the nation of Israel come from?
Author: Traditionally Moses, but the stories are much older.
Fun fact: Most of the famous Bible stories you have heard about are probably found in the book of Genesis. This is where the stories of Adam and Eve, Cain and Abel, Noah and the Ark, the Tower of Babel, Abraham and Isaac, Jacobs ladder, and Josephs coat of many colors are recorded.
